import React from "react"; function About() { return (

👋 About me

A little more about me

I am studying Electrical Engineering and I enjoy learning how things are made, tested, and improved. I like working on ideas that can turn into useful products, not just classroom concepts.

During my internship, I learned how important teamwork, planning, and clear communication are in real projects. It also showed me how design choices affect manufacturing and the final product.

My strengths include problem solving, circuit understanding, documentation, and teamwork. I like keeping things practical and easy to understand.

Education

Electrical Engineering student focused on practical learning and project work.

Internship

Learned how teams work, how ideas move into action, and why details matter.

Skills

Problem solving, teamwork, documentation, and practical thinking.

); } export default About;
